title: Protocolo de evaluación visual de quebradas para Puerto Rico
author: Rodríguez, N.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A Stream Visual Assessment Protocol is presented in Spanish for the use in evaluating streams in Puerto Rico. The protocol allows for the assessment of stream physical condition. It is based on the USDA SVAP protocol.
steps_raw: A Stream Visual Assessment Protocol is presented in Spanish for the use in evaluating streams in Puerto Rico. The protocol allows for the assessment of stream physical condition. It is based on the USDA SVAP protocol.
